hero.description: I create dive journeys with close attention to detail, in collaboration with trusted local partners. Whenever possible, I personally accompany the journeys, ensuring safety, ease and an experience aligned with the destination.

mission.label: Dive Journeys, Chosen with Care
mission.heading: More Than Just a Holiday
mission.description: Each journey is carefully selected, with a strong focus on quality, safety, respect for the ocean and the communities we visit. Blue Soul Journeys focuses exclusively on dive travel - from liveaboard expeditions to stays at carefully selected dive resorts or lodges.
mission.value1Description: Every destination is chosen with care, working exclusively with trusted local partners and well-tested experiences.
mission.value2Description: Travel that respects the ocean, the people and natural rhythms — creating meaningful experiences without rush or excess.
mission.value3Description: Each journey is designed with intention, shaped around who you are and what you seek from the ocean.

aboutUs.label: What I Do
aboutUs.heading: Dive Journeys Designed with Care & Purpose
aboutUs.description: I design dive journeys bringing together trusted local knowledge, thoughtful planning and respect for the ocean.
aboutUs.subheading: Born from real dives and genuine connections
aboutUs.paragraph1: Blue Soul Journeys grew from years spent in and around the ocean — diving remote reefs, exploring iconic wrecks and sharing time with people whose lives are shaped by the sea.
aboutUs.paragraph2: Every journey I create is rooted in places I know, journeys I've experienced first-hand and partners I trust deeply. I don't build trips from a catalogue.
aboutUs.paragraph3: Whether it's a liveaboard in the Red Sea, drifting through the channels of the Maldives or slow, immersive dives along the Mozambican coast, each journey is designed to feel personal, conscious and connected to the ocean.
aboutUs.value1Description: I believe travel should respect the ocean, the people and natural rhythms — creating meaningful experiences without rush or excess.
aboutUs.value2Description: For me, diving is more than exploration. It's a way to slow down, observe and reconnect — with the ocean, with others and with ourselves.
aboutUs.value3Description: Each itinerary is thoughtfully designed, built around trusted local partners — always prioritising safety, quality and authenticity.

destinations.heading: Featured Dive Journeys
destinations.description1: From remote coral reefs to legendary wrecks, these dive journeys invite you to explore the ocean in its many expressions - from calm, contemplative dives to more intense encounters.
destinations.description2: Each destination moves at its own rhythm, leaving space to observe, feel and dive at your own pace.

contact.label: Get in Touch
contact.heading: Ready to Start Your
contact.description: Let’s create a travel experience that feels truly yours - guided by experience and a genuine connection to the ocean.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell me what you have in mind - destinations, type of diving or just the idea of a journey.

footer.brandDescription: Dive journeys designed for those who truly feel at home in the ocean. Each journey is chosen for its quality, ethical approach and genuine connection to the ocean.
footer.copyright: Blue Soul Journeys. All rights reserved.

howItWorks.label: How It Works
howItWorks.heading: Every Journey Starts with a Conversation
howItWorks.description: From there, I design a travel experience shaped around who you are, how you dive and what you seek from the ocean.
howItWorks.step1Description: A relaxed conversation to understand your travel style, diving experience and what you're looking for — beyond dates and destinations.
howItWorks.step2Description: Based on that conversation, I design a travel proposal with destinations, stays and dive experiences that fit your rhythm.
howItWorks.step3Description: I take care of logistics and coordination so everything runs smoothly - from dive operators and liveaboards to accommodation and transfers.
howItWorks.step4Description: Before and during your journey, I’m available whenever needed. The idea is simple: so you can focus on the ocean and fully enjoy the experience.
howItWorks.trust1: I work closely with a small circle of trusted local operators — people I've dived with, learned from and built long-term relationships with.
howItWorks.trust2: These partnerships are built on clear values: safety, respect for the ocean and genuine care for the experiences of each diver.
howItWorks.trust3: Some journeys are accompanied by me, whenever my presence adds real value to the group and the overall experience.
howItWorks.trust4: Others are led by the local teams I trust completely — always with the same level of care, preparation and attention to detail.
howItWorks.expect1: Transparency, honest guidance and a journey designed with purpose.
howItWorks.expect2: No rush. No unnecessary extras. Just thoughtfully structured dive experiences, delivered responsibly and aligned with what truly matters to you.
howItWorks.expect3: Beyond planning trips, I create experiences, select trusted partners and support you before and during the entire journey.

whyTravelWithMe.label: Why Travel With Blue Soul Journeys
whyTravelWithMe.heading: Travel with Purpose. Explore with Confidence.
whyTravelWithMe.description: Real ocean experience, quality partners and meaningful, personal travel designed around you.
whyTravelWithMe.reason1Description: Years spent in and around the ocean have shaped the way I travel - and the way each journey is designed. I help you choose destinations and dive experiences that match your rhythm, interests and comfort level. Everything is based on real experience, never on catalogues.
whyTravelWithMe.reason2Description: Every destination is chosen with care. I work only with local partners I trust - responsible operators and well-tested experiences. So you can travel with confidence, knowing you’re supported at every stage of the journey.
whyTravelWithMe.reason3Description: Each journey is designed with intention, balancing nature, culture, adventure and time to simply be. The result is an experience that feels natural and authentic. Never rushed. Never generic.
whyTravelWithMe.withMe3: Support before and during your journey
whyTravelWithMe.withMe5: A journey that truly feels like yours
whyTravelWithMe.onYourOwn4: Hard to know what's truly worth it

myStory.label: My Story
myStory.heading: The ocean changed the way I see the world.
myStory.timeline2018P1: My journey began in 2018, when I completed my Open Water certification aboard my first liveaboard in Australia.
myStory.timeline2018P2: On that first dive, something shifted. I immediately felt a sense of belonging - a quiet mix of freedom, clarity and presence that only the ocean can offer.
myStory.timeline2018P3: Since then, the ocean has stayed with me, wherever I go.
myStory.timeline2020P1: In 2020, a liveaboard experience in Thailand deepened that connection even further.
myStory.timeline2020P2: Later, in Tofo (Mozambique), I moved closer to marine conservation and completed my Advanced Open Water Course certification. During that time I took part in conservation activities with whale sharks and manta rays, and began learning much more about marine life - from turtles and sharks to fish identification.
myStory.timeline2020P3: Each experience added a new layer — not only as a diver, but as a person.
myStory.timeline2024P1: In 2024, I explored Raja Ampat, one of the most biodiverse marine regions on the planet.
myStory.timeline2024P2: Being there confirmed something I had already been feeling for some time: the ocean has the power to change the way we see the world, how we move through it and how we relate to nature.
myStory.timeline2025Title: The Origin of Blue Soul Journeys
myStory.timeline2025P1: In 2025, during a liveaboard in Egypt, surrounded by vibrant reefs, historic wrecks and remarkable people, I realized I had reached an important point in my journey.
myStory.timeline2025P2: I wanted to share this connection to the ocean with others - not occasionally or superficially, but in a way that was consistent and intentional.
myStory.timeline2025P3: I wanted to create a space where divers could feel safe, supported and free to experience the ocean at their own rhythm.
myStory.timeline2025P4: A space built on trust - in the partners, the itineraries and the way each journey is designed.
myStory.timeline2025P5: A place where the ocean isn't just the backdrop, but part of the experience. That was when Blue Soul Journeys was born.
myStory.connectionHeading: More Than Places — It's About the People
myStory.connectionP1: What makes these journeys truly special isn't only where we go, but who we share them with.
myStory.connectionP2: The ocean is where I slow down, breathe deeply and feel most present. It's where I gain perspective and return to balance.
myStory.connectionP3: Over time, I’ve realized that the ocean doesn’t just transform us individually - it also creates connection.
myStory.connectionP4: On liveaboards and shared journeys, conversations unfold naturally. People connect through a shared respect for the ocean, for simplicity and for a more conscious way of travelling.
myStory.value1Description: Each journey is thoughtfully designed and built with trusted partners - so you can simply be present and enjoy the experience.
myStory.value2Description: The best moments happen when people with different perspectives come together and share the same respect for the ocean.
myStory.wantHeading: I want you to feel what I felt
myStory.wantLine1: The magic of the underwater world,
myStory.wantLine2: The silence of sunrise at sea,
myStory.wantLine3: The excitement of learning something new,
myStory.wantLine4: The calm that only the ocean can give.
myStory.wantP1: And I want you to feel safe — knowing your journey has been designed with care, attention and trusted partners.
myStory.wantClosing2: It's a way to reconnect with yourself.

destinationPage.itineraryHeading: Example of Your Journey, Day by Day

red-sea.name: The Red Sea
red-sea.description: A journey into the origins of modern diving, shaped by history, vibrant reefs and some of the most iconic wrecks of the world.
longDescription: Our Red Sea expeditions take you to some of the most legendary dive sites of the northern route - from the historic wrecks of Abu Nuhas to the dramatic reefs of Ras Mohammed and the coral gardens of the Tiran Islands. Throughout the journey, dives unfold across vibrant reef systems, walls covered in marine life and impressive schools of fish that make this region one of the world’s most iconic diving destinations.

Whether you are drawn by the history beneath the waves or by the extraordinary diversity of marine life thriving on every reef, the Red Sea offers a diving experience deeply rooted in tradition and always full of discovery.
red-sea.highlight1Description: Dive the SS Thistlegorm, the Rosalie Moller, and other historic wrecks preserved by the warm, crystal-clear waters of the Red Sea.
red-sea.highlight2Description: Explore vibrant hard and soft coral gardens teeming with life, from tiny nudibranchs to giant moray eels hidden among the reefs.
red-sea.highlight3Description: Spot oceanic whitetip sharks, barracudas, large schools of fish and, at times, dolphins or manta rays in the open waters of the Red Sea.
red-sea.vesselName: Red Sea Liveaboard - Extended North Route (Wrecks & Reefs)
red-sea.vesselDescription: A comfortable and well-equipped liveaboard, ideal for exploring the legendary reefs and wrecks of the northern Red Sea. On board you’ll find comfortable cabins, spacious dive facilities, Nitrox available, and an experienced crew who know these waters extremely well.
amenities: Spacious dive deck with personal gear storage
Sundeck and lounge areas for relaxing between dives
Full-board meals with fresh, local cuisine

itinerary.title: Arrival & Check-in
itinerary.description: Arrive in Hurghada or Marsa Alam. Transfer to the liveaboard, settle into your cabin, safety briefing and a check dive in sheltered waters.

itinerary.title: Northern Wrecks & Reefs
itinerary.description: Dive the SS Thistlegorm and surrounding reef systems. Explore the cargo holds, encounter resident marine life, and night dive on the wreck.

itinerary.title: Brothers Islands
itinerary.description: Open water crossing to the Brothers. Wall dives with soft corals, hammerhead sharks, and the Numidia wreck. Some of the most dramatic diving in the Red Sea.

itinerary.title: Elphinstone & Daedalus
itinerary.description: Drift dives along Elphinstone's famous walls, with chances to see oceanic whitetip sharks. Daedalus offers pristine reefs and pelagic encounters.

itinerary.title: Return & Departure
itinerary.description: Final morning dive, return to port. Transfer to the airport for your departure flight.

red-sea.transfers: Airport transfers between Sharm El Sheikh International Airport (SSH) and the liveaboard marina are included in the journey. I will coordinate your arrival and departure time to ensure a smooth connection. If you plan to arrive earlier or extend your stay, I can also help arrange additional accommodation. Transfers are scheduled according to the liveaboard departure and return times.

maldives.name: The Maldives
maldives.description: A journey shaped by the rhythm of the ocean - drifting through channels and currents where encounters with manta rays, reef sharks and other large pelagic species are part of everyday diving in the Maldives.
longDescription: The Maldives is a diver’s paradise - a chain of coral atolls scattered across the Indian Ocean. Here the diving is defined by movement: warm currents flowing through the channels bring an extraordinary concentration of marine life, from reef sharks and manta rays to whale sharks and vast schools of fish.

Our Maldives itineraries explore the Central Atolls, including North Malé, South Malé, Ari and Vaavu. The diving combines thrilling channel drifts with vibrant coral reefs and world-famous manta cleaning stations, creating one of the most iconic liveaboard experiences in the Indian Ocean.
Above the surface, life moves at a short rhythm. Between dives you can relax on deck, snorkel in turquoise lagoons or simply watch the sunset over the endless horizon of the Indian Ocean.
maldives.highlight1Description: Dive world-famous cleaning stations where manta rays gather in remarkable numbers throughout the season.
maldives.highlight2Description: Drift through powerful channels surrounded by reef sharks, rays and dense schools of fish.
maldives.highlight3Description: Explore pristine coral reefs and vibrant marine life across the scattered atolls of the Maldives.
maldives.vesselDescription: A traditional Maldivian-style liveaboard designed to offer comfort and functionality during a week of diving in the Maldives. On board, a small group of divers allows for personalized briefings and flexible itineraries adapted to sea conditions and marine life encounters.
amenities: Full-board meals with Maldivian and international cuisine
included: Tea, coffee, water and soft drinks available throughout the day
Airport transfers between Malé International Airport and the liveaboard
* The number of dives may vary depending on weather conditions and the final itinerary.
notIncluded: Marine park or protected area fees (when applicable)

itinerary.title: Arrival in Malé
itinerary.description: Arrive at Velana International Airport. Transfer to the liveaboard, welcome briefing and a sunset check dive on a nearby reef.

itinerary.title: South Malé & Vaavu Atoll
itinerary.description: Channel dives with grey reef sharks and eagle rays. Visit manta cleaning stations and drift through thilas alive with colour.

itinerary.title: Meemu & Thaa Atolls
itinerary.description: Venture into less-visited atolls. Night dives with nurse sharks, pristine coral gardens, and chances for whale shark encounters.

itinerary.title: Deep South — Huvadhoo Atoll
itinerary.description: The jewel of the trip. Strong currents bring dense schools of fish, hammerheads, and mantas. Some of the most thrilling drift dives in the Maldives.

itinerary.title: Return & Departure
itinerary.description: Final morning dive, cruise back towards Malé. Transfer to the airport for your departure.

maldives.transfers: The liveaboard departs from Malé, easily accessible from Velana International Airport (MLE). Transfers between the airport and the liveaboard marina are included in the journey. I will coordinate arrival and departure times to ensure a smooth connection. If you arrive earlier or depart later, I can also help arrange accommodation in Malé or Hulhumalé. Transfers are organized according to the liveaboard departure and return schedule.

mozambique.name: Mozambique
mozambique.description: A journey developed in partnership with local dive centres and accommodation, where connection to the ocean and the local community is part of the experience.
longDescription: Mozambique is one of the last true frontiers of diving. Along the Inhambane coastline, the warm Agulhas Current brings nutrient-rich waters close to shore, creating a marine ecosystem of remarkable diversity. This is where encounters with some of the ocean’s giants take place - whale sharks, oceanic manta rays, humpback whales and the rare oceanic manta.

Our Mozambique expeditions are based in Tofo and along the Inhambane coast, where diving is raw, dynamic and memorable. Many outgoings begin with a short boat ride through the surf before reaching reef systems that few divers have explored. Visibility can surprise you, currents bring life to the reef and every dive may reveal something unexpected.

Beyond diving, Tofo has its own unique energy. Small beach restaurants serve good meals at accessible prices, while outdoor bars and terraces create a relaxed atmosphere that continues into the night. Among surfers, divers and travellers and locals, the village maintains a free and authentic spirit.
Local culture adds another dimension to the journey. Fishing communities, colourful markets and African flavours prepared on the beach make Tofo a destination that is lived well beyond the diving.
mozambique.highlight1Description: One of the best places in the world for encounters with whale sharks and oceanic manta rays in open water. Along the coast of Tofo these species can be seen throughout much of the year, making the region a reference destination for divers and marine researchers.
mozambique.highlight2Description: Dive along reef systems on the wildcoastline of Inhambane, far from the crowds and rich in marine life. Each dive can reveal something new, from large pelagic species to the smaller life of the reef.
mozambique.highlight3Description: Connect with coastal communities and experience the rhythm of life by the ocean. From local markets and fishing villages to the warmth of Mozambican hospitality, every day in Tofo offers an authentic taste of East African coastal life.
mozambique.vesselDescription: A beach lodge in Tofo, operated in partnership with a local dive centre. Simple, comfortable and connected to the life of the village, it offers easy access to diving and to the relaxed atmosphere of the Inhambane coast.
amenities: On-site dive centre with experienced guides

itinerary.title: Arrival in Tofo
itinerary.description: Arrive in Inhambane. Transfer to the dive resort in Tofo, settle in and enjoy your first evening on the beach.

itinerary.title: Reef Exploration
itinerary.description: Morning boat dives on Tofo's reef systems — Manta Reef, Giants Castle, and the Back Wall. Afternoon snorkelling or beach time.

itinerary.title: Ocean Safari
itinerary.description: A full-day ocean safari searching for whale sharks, mantas, dolphins, and humpback whales (seasonal). An unforgettable open-water experience.

itinerary.title: Deep Dives & Community
itinerary.description: Explore deeper sites along the wild coast. Visit a local fishing community, learn about traditional practices, and enjoy a beachside seafood dinner.

itinerary.title: Final Dive & Departure
itinerary.description: One last morning dive, time to say goodbye to Tofo. Transfer to Inhambane airport for your departure.

mozambique.transfers: Transfers between Inhambane Airport (INH) and the dive lodge in Tofo (approximately 25 minutes) are included. I can also help arrange transfers from Maputo (Mavalane International Airport) if you’re flying via the capital - the drive takes around 6 hours along the coast.
